Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dream Well]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Dream Well is a well containing clear water tinted purple that radiates focus and determination.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Dream Well is designed to boost focus and eliminate mental fatigue in humans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Dream Well is a location associated with the motto 'Invigorating power to keep those motivated movers moving and those tired thinkers thinking.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dream Well water can smooth out consciousness and improve sleep quality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — The Dream Well contains water that can be used for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon drank from the Dream Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Dream Well water improved Orthos' mental state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — the Dream Well improves reaction speed and focus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross spent a long time in the Dream Well.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon found Dross in the Dream Well.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
